allow: Bash(./.venv/bin/python -c "import anthropic; print\('anthropic', anthropic.__version__\); import main, llm, extract, graph_store; print\('modules OK'\); print\('provider:', llm.active_provider\(\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engine:',d.get\('provider'\)\); [print\(' ','• '*n['level'], n['label'], '—', n['summary']\) for n in d['graph']['nodes']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engine:',d.get\('provider'\)\); print\('total topics now:', len\(d['graph']['nodes']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;g=json.load\(sys.stdin\);c={};[c.__setitem__\(n['count'],c.get\(n['count'],0\)+1\) for n in g['nodes']];print\('count distribution:',c\)")
